label.purpose: Breadcrumbs, metadata, table headers, and compact controls.

code.purpose: Multiline code, queries, and API samples.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Modal search and assistant surfaces only.

shadows.name: focus
shadows.purpose: Visible keyboard focus without changing layout.

motion.name: hover-press
motion.purpose: Immediate control hover and press feedback.

motion.name: popover-dialog
motion.purpose: Popover and dialog transitions, with reduced-motion fallback.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: Compact inverse action used for consequential, immediate operations such as sending an API request.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { height: 30px; padding: 0 10px; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); color: var(--text-on-inverse-primary, #0a0a0a); background: var(--bg-emph-primary-inverse, #f5f5f5); font: 600 11px/16px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); cursor: pointer; transition: opacity var(--duration-1, 80ms) var(--ease-out, ease-out); } .ds-button-primary:hover { opacity: .88; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-button-primary:active { opacity: .76; }

components.name: Secondary Action
components.description: Bordered compact action for header and supporting controls.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.1)); border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); color: var(--text-secondary, #e5e5e5); background: var(--bg-emph-secondary, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); font: 500 13px/16px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--duration-1, 80ms) var(--ease-out, ease-out); } .ds-button-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-emph-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.15)); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Prompt
components.description: Full-width documentation search entry point with a compact keyboard hint.
components.css: .ds-search { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, rgba(255,255,255,.2)); border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); color: var(--text-tertiary, #a3a3a3); background: var(--bg-surface, #171717); cursor: pointer; } .ds-search svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 1.8; } .ds-search span { flex: 1; text-align: left; font: 400 15px/20px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); } .ds-search kbd { padding: 1px 5px; border: 1px solid var(--border-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.1)); border-radius: 3px; color: var(--text-quaternary, #737373); background: var(--bg-inert, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); font: 450 10px/14px var(--font-mono, monospace); } .ds-search:hover { background: var(--bg-raised, #1e1e1e); } .ds-search:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Header Navigation Item
components.description: Top-level section navigation with tonal hover and weight-based active state.
components.html: DocumentationQuery referenceAPI reference
components.css: .ds-header-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-header-nav a { padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); color: var(--text-tertiary, #a3a3a3); font: 500 13px/16px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); text-decoration: none; } .ds-header-nav a:hover { color: var(--text-secondary, #e5e5e5); background: var(--bg-emph-tertiary, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); } .ds-header-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-header-nav a.ds-active { color: var(--text-primary, #fafafa); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Dense article navigation row with truncation and an optional right-aligned API method.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { min-height: 28px; padding: 6px 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); color: var(--text-primary, #fafafa); background: var(--bg-emph-secondary, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); font: 600 13px/16px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); text-decoration: none; } .ds-sidebar-item span { min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-sidebar-item b { min-width: 31px; margin-left: auto; padding: 1px 3px; border-radius: 3px; color: #60a5fa; background: rgba(59,130,246,.11); font: 600 8px/12px var(--font-mono, monospace); text-align: center; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: var(--bg-emph-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.15)); } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Documentation Notice
components.description: Compact monospace callout with a semantic rule and quiet background.
components.html:
Note

Keep API credentials in session storage only.
components.css: .ds-notice { padding: 14px 16px; border-left: 3px solid var(--color-info, #3b82f6); color: var(--text-secondary, #e5e5e5); background: var(--bg-inert, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); font: 450 12px/19px var(--font-mono, monospace); } .ds-notice strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; color: var(--text-primary, #fafafa); font-weight: 600; } .ds-notice p { margin: 0; } .ds-notice:focus-within { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Code Language Tabs
components.description: Compact code-language switcher with a short Axiom Orange selection marker.
components.css: .ds-code-tabs { min-height: 38px; padding: 0 10px; display: flex; align-items: stretch; gap: 2px; border: 1px solid var(--border-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.1)); border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px) var(--radius-2, 4px) 0 0; background: var(--bg-surface, #171717); } .ds-code-tabs button { position: relative; padding: 0 8px; border: 0; color: var(--text-quaternary, #737373); background: transparent; font: 500 11px/16px var(--font-mono, monospace); cursor: pointer; } .ds-code-tabs button:hover { color: var(--text-secondary, #e5e5e5); } .ds-code-tabs button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-code-tabs button[aria-selected="true"] { color: var(--text-primary, #fafafa); } .ds-code-tabs button[aria-selected="true"]::after { position: absolute; right: 8px; bottom: -1px; left: 8px; height: 2px; background: var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); content: ""; }

components.name: API Schema Table
components.description: Dense technical table with monospace metadata and readable descriptive copy.
components.css: .ds-schema { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--border-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.1)); border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-2, 4px); overflow: hidden; color: var(--text-secondary, #e5e5e5); background: var(--bg-surface, #171717); font: 400 12px/18px var(--font-sans, sans-serif); } .ds-schema th { padding: 7px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-primary, rgba(255,255,255,.1)); color: var(--text-tertiary, #a3a3a3); background: var(--bg-inert, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); font: 550 11px/16px var(--font-mono, monospace); text-align: left; } .ds-schema td { padding: 8px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-tertiary, rgba(255,255,255,.04)); } .ds-schema tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 0; } .ds-schema code { color: var(--text-primary, #fafafa); font: 500 12px/18px var(--font-mono, monospace); } .ds-schema tbody tr:hover { background: var(--bg-raised, #1e1e1e); } .ds-schema:focus-within { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #da5c2b); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Axiom Docs should feel like a well-calibrated instrument for technical work: exact without being brittle, information-dense without becoming noisy, and quiet enough that the reader's task remains dominant. Fumadocs supplies the documentation infrastructure; the visible system is Axiom's own, expressed through graphite surfaces, precise typography, compact controls, and a deliberately scarce orange signal.

The composition is centered around reading and scanning. Long-form articles use comfortable measure and strong vertical rhythm, while navigation, tables, query examples, and API controls become denser where comparison speed matters. The system is flat by default and gains depth through tonal layers, hairline borders, and clear state changes—not decorative effects.

It must never read as a stock Fumadocs theme, a generic documentation template, or a sparse marketing page. Every component should earn its space and expose its purpose immediately.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first graphite surfaces with a complete light counterpart.
Restrained Axiom Orange used as an interaction signal.
Geist for fluent reading; Geist Mono for technical texture and control labels.
Compact 2–4px working radii and a 4px spacing rhythm.
Flat tonal layering, hairline borders, and shadows reserved for floating UI.
Comfortable prose paired with dense, scan-friendly reference components.

rules.name: The Orange Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange marks an actionable or selected point and should occupy less than 10% of a typical screen. Its rarity gives it authority.

rules.name: The Contrast Ladder Rule
rules.body: Headings, strong text, body copy, metadata, and disabled content must remain visibly distinct. Never flatten them into one gray.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Blue, green, amber, and red communicate state only. Never let them compete with Axiom Orange as brand accents.

rules.name: The Reading First Rule
rules.body: Long-form text stays within 65–75 characters, uses a generous 1.75 line height, and never inherits compact UI leading.

rules.name: The Mono With Purpose Rule
rules.body: Monospace means code, query syntax, identifiers, values, or technical chrome. It is never a blanket aesthetic applied to ordinary prose.

rules.name: The Hierarchy Before Scale Rule
rules.body: Use weight, contrast, and spacing before reaching for oversized typography.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: If a surface is part of normal document flow, it gets tonal contrast and a hairline border—not a drop shadow.

rules.name: The Structural Shadow Rule
rules.body: A shadow is allowed only when the element floats above unrelated content and must communicate that change in layer.

dos: Do make Fumadocs infrastructure disappear behind an unmistakably Axiom visual system.
Do use Axiom Orange as a scarce interaction signal and keep status colors semantic.
Do preserve the contrast ladder between headings, body copy, metadata, code, and disabled states in both themes.
Do keep ordinary controls and containers at 3–4px radii with a compact 4px spacing rhythm.
Do center the reading experience in the viewport, protect 720px article measure, and keep the landing-page TOC column reserved even when empty.
Do use tonal layers and one-pixel borders for structure; reserve shadows for floating menus and dialogs.
Do keep documentation, query reference, and API reference coherent while preserving their distinct controls and density.
Do meet WCAG 2.2 AA, including keyboard access, visible focus, contrast, semantic structure, and reduced-motion behavior.
donts: Don't ship a stock Fumadocs theme whose framework defaults are more visible than Axiom's identity.
Don't reproduce Mintlify's visual language or information architecture; Mintlify is migration context, not a design target.
Don't create generic documentation templates with oversized rounded cards, pill-heavy controls, decorative shadows, or blue-as-default interaction color.
Don't flatten the contrast hierarchy and make body copy, headings, labels, and code feel equally prominent.
Don't use sparse marketing-page treatments that sacrifice technical density, navigation depth, or fast scanning.
Don't add ornamental effects that compete with reading, including gratuitous gradients, glassmorphism, and animation without a functional purpose.
Don't add a second mobile navigation trigger or detach top-level sections from the documentation hierarchy.
Don't hide essential code actions from keyboard users even when pointer users reveal them on hover.
